reviews.comment:
El ACA es fantástico y su gente, habitantes con seriedad y experiencia. Te resuelven cualquier problema con el auto en la calle. Nunca te dejan «a pata». Pero ayer domingo por la tarde, había un solo muchacho por surtidor. Debe ser tema de YPF. Hubo mucha espera y la gente se quejaba. Y además con el 5% de descuento se sabe que ese día hay más autos que cargan. (Podrían hacer el descuento viernes, sábado y domingo, de forma tal de no acumular consumo un solo día).

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is fantastic, as are its people, serious and experienced residents. They solve any car problem on the street. They never leave you stranded. But yesterday, Sunday afternoon, there was only one person at each pump. It must be a YPF issue. There were long waits and people were complaining. Plus, with the 5% discount, it's known that more cars are filling up that day. (They could offer the discount on Friday, Saturday, and Sunday, so as not to accumulate fuel consumption on a single day.)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcmJxaE1REAE
